e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Committed-turn receipt fields can now be represented as a substrate-native receipt cell and ingested into the same code-tool-learning coding-act row across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu.

test_flows: Construct a receipt cell carrying kind, status, source_surfaces, patch_recipe, verifiers, choice_receipt, and learned_delta fields.
Validate that the receipt cell lowers into ctl-coding-act with source listening, patch speaking, verifier receipts, choice receipt, and learned delta.
Require the code-tool-learning band verdict to ratchet from 262143 to 524287 on all four kernels.
